name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature working. Include CLI command examples if applicable.

```
flash [sim] > your-proposed-command
  Expected output...
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you have considered, and why the proposed solution is preferred.

## Affected Components

Which parts of the system would this feature touch? (Check all that apply)

- [ ] CLI / terminal interface
- [ ] AI interpreter / command parsing
- [ ] Trading pipeline / transaction execution
- [ ] Market scanner / strategies
- [ ] Risk monitor / portfolio
- [ ] Protocol inspector
- [ ] Wallet management
- [ ] RPC / network layer
- [ ] Plugin system
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that support the request.
